# Weekly Metrics 2026-07-12

> Window: 2026-07-05 -> 2026-07-12 13:50 UTC (7d) with 14d cross-check
> against 2026-06-28 baseline. Posted Sunday (Monday slot skipped
> upstream last week). Previous file: `.github/research/2026-07-01-metrics.md`.

## Headline (7d)

- **PRs merged: 14.** Mix: 9 dependabot, 3 auto-sync (#927, #942, #950),
  2 hand-authored (#944 `agent`, #945 `core`). **Zero agent
  auto-implement merges** (down from 10 last cycle). Source: `gh pr
  list --state merged --search "merged:>=2026-07-05"`.
- **Median TTM: 3.67 min.** Max 667.05 min (PR #934 stalled 11h before
  Daily Merge). Min 2.45 min.
- **Open `auto-implement` backlog: 0** (all 54 historical issues
  closed). **5 open `enhancement` issues** filed 2026-07-05/06 (#923,
  #924, #926, #928, #930) but not labelled `auto-implement` -- likely
  taxonomy drift in Agent 2, verify with `role-product`.
- **Open `autohealing-escalation`: 9** (up from 5). Four NEW: #946
  Security Scanning (07-06), #947 Repository Sync (07-07), #948 Sync
  Upstream (07-07), #949 Agent 6 Prompt Improver (07-08). Aging 5
  (#685, #697, #736, #743, #753) still open at 34-40 days. **Top
  finding of the week.**
- **Coverage: not available.** CI runs 29192638276 / 29192312426 do
  not publish `coverage-summary.json` (only HTML `coverage-report`).
  Last known baseline 62.28% (2026-07-01). Fix in `role-infrastructure`
  scope. Did not estimate.
- **Releases: 3 tagged** (`v1.17.28`, `v1.17.29`, `v1.17.30`). Well
  above the "one per two weeks" floor.

## Friction signals (ranked)

1. **Agent 1 Research: 0/6, 100% failure.** Six scheduled runs
   2026-07-07 -> 07-12 failed within seconds. Run 29182912568 logs
   show `/tmp/system-prompt.md` never produced. Root cause is infra,
   not prompt: `.github/workflows/agent1-research.yml` has
   `KILO_RETRIES=1` vs fleet standard 3, and no retry-with-backoff
   wrapper around `kilo run`. Owner: `role-infrastructure`.
2. **Repository Sync + Sync Upstream: 1/7 each (86% failure).** Both
   started failing 2026-07-07 (same day as escalation #948). Shared
   root cause suspected. Owner: `role-infrastructure`; escalation
   #948 already tracks it.
3. **Autohealing-escalation queue doubled** (5 -> 9). Healer catches
   failures; closure loop doesn't keep pace. Sweep the aging 5 by
   2026-07-19 or they become permanent noise.
4. **Zero auto-implement PRs merged.** Either Agent 2 files under
   `enhancement` instead of `auto-implement` (verify #923 labels), or
   Agent 3 succeeded 68x on `pull_request` events only (verify by
   `event` field). If (1), `role-product` prompt fix. If (2), flag to
   next planning cycle -- fleet healthy but velocity dropping.
5. **CI Auto-Fix effectively dead** (0/2 real runs, 87 skipped over
   14d). Same pattern for 3 cycles. Either remove the schedule or
   fix. Owner: `role-infrastructure`.
6. **Coverage artefact missing.** CI must publish
   `coverage-summary.json` as a top-level artefact. Blocking this
   report's coverage line. Owner: `role-infrastructure`.

## Constitution drift

None. All 14 merged PRs stayed in scope: `deps` (9), `agent` (2),
`core` (1), `sync` (2). No cross-module refactors, no provider or
permission surface changes. PR #945 correctly routes `src/mcp/
client.ts` through `src/utils/logger.ts` (ESLint rule respected).

## Prompt-quality scan (28 files)

Scanned all `.github/prompts/*.md`. Bar unchanged. **All 7 findings
from 2026-07-01 remain unaddressed** -- previous cycle deferred filing
PR comments. Prioritised for this week's regressions:

- **Skip Agent 1 prompt rewrite this cycle.** Root cause is infra
  (finding 1 above); prompt changes will not help until KILO_RETRIES
  is fixed. Re-evaluate after infra fix lands.
- **New: `agent-autohealing-system.md` (39 lines) -- no explicit rule
  for when to open `autohealing-escalation` vs retry silently.**
  Escalation queue doubled this week; healer's threshold appears too
  low. Recommend appending a `### Escalate when:` block:
  *"Only open an escalation issue when the same workflow-run
  combination has failed 3+ times in 24h AND the auto-fix attempt
  produced no diff. Otherwise retry silently and log to the run
  summary."*
- **New: `role-infrastructure.md` (103 lines) -- no SLA on
  autohealing-escalation closure.** Recommend adding to Definition
  of done: *"Any `autohealing-escalation` issue older than 14 days
  is triaged: fixed, converted to a normal `bug` issue, or closed
  as WONTFIX with reasoning."*
- Carry-over findings #1-4 from 2026-07-01 (Done-when blocks for
  `agent3-implement-task.md`, `agent5-release-system.md`,
  `agent4-review-system.md`) -- file as PR comments this cycle.
  Findings #5-7 (vague verbs) deferred to next batched pass.
